refined_caption: There is water on the hospital floor with a bed visible in the background. The water appears to be a puddle.
complaint_description: I was walking down the hospital floor and noticed a large puddle of water on the ground. This is a slipping hazard and could cause someone to fall. The hospital should clean this up immediately to ensure patient safety.
voice_text: There's water all over the floor here, it's really slippery and someone's gonna get hurt if it's not cleaned up.
